name: Weekly Project Health Dashboard with AI Insights

parameters.content:
## ⚠️ Error Handler
Catches any failure in the workflow and posts a Slack alert with the error message, failing node name, and execution ID. Wire the error output of any critical node here to prevent silent failures going unnoticed.

## 📊 Weekly Project Health Dashboard

### How it works
Every Friday at 5 PM, this workflow reads project data from three Google Sheets tabs (Alpha, Beta, Gamma), calculates a RAG (Red / Amber / Green) status for each project based on schedule variance, budget burn, and open issue count, then asks GPT-4o Mini to write a plain-English executive summary per project. The results are assembled into a styled HTML email and sent to your leadership distribution list. If the AI call fails at any point, a Slack alert fires immediately so nothing goes silently wrong.

### Setup steps
1. **Google Sheets** — Connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential and update the `documentId` in each of the three Read Sheet nodes to point to your own spreadsheet. Your sheet tabs must include columns: `project_name`, `planned_end`, `forecast_end`, `budget_total`, `budget_spent`, `open_issues_count`, `pct_complete`.
2. **OpenAI** — Add your OpenAI API key under the GPT-4o Health Summary node credential.
3. **Gmail** — Connect Gmail OAuth2 and update the `sendTo` field in Send Dashboard Email with your recipient address.
4. **Slack** — Connect your Slack OAuth2 credential and set the correct channel ID in both Slack alert nodes.
5. **Test run** — Use "Execute Workflow" manually to verify the email renders correctly before activating the Friday schedule.

## ⏰ Scheduled Trigger
Fires every Friday at 5 PM using a cron expression. To change the schedule, edit the cron field directly. The trigger fans out in parallel to all three sheet readers simultaneously.

## 📋 Read Project Sheets
Pulls the latest data from three separate Google Sheets tabs — one per project. Each tab is read independently in parallel, then merged into a single dataset. Add more sheet nodes here if you need to track additional projects.

nodes.name: Section: RAG Scoring and AI Summaries

parameters.content:
## 🧮 RAG Scoring & AI Summaries
Merges all rows, then scores each project across three dimensions — schedule variance, budget burn %, and open issue count. A composite score determines Red / Amber / Green status. GPT-4o Mini then writes a 3-line executive summary per project. If the AI call errors, the error branch routes to Slack rather than silently dropping the project.

## 📧 Email Assembly & Delivery
Aggregates all project summaries into a single colour-coded HTML email with a portfolio status bar (🔴 Red / 🟡 Amber / 🟢 Green counts). Sent via Gmail OAuth2. Subject line includes the date and status counts for quick scanning in an inbox.

## 🔐 Credentials & Security
Use OAuth2 for Google Sheets, Gmail, and Slack. Use an API key credential for OpenAI. Never hardcode tokens in node parameters. Replace all email addresses and channel IDs with your own before sharing this template.

values.content: You are a senior project management consultant writing concise executive summaries for a weekly leadership dashboard. You are direct, specific, and action-oriented. No fluff.

nodes.name: Attach AI Narrative to Project Data

parameters.jsCode:
// ───────────────────────────────────────────── // Aggregate all project items and build // a single beautiful HTML email // ───────────────────────────────────────────── const items = $input.all(); const projects = items.map(i => i.json); const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); const summaryRow = (p) => { const bgColor = p.ragStatus === 'RED' ? '#FFF0F0' : p.ragStatus === 'AMBER' ? '#FFFBF0' : '#F0FFF5'; const borderColor = p.ragStatus === 'RED' ? '#C00000' : p.ragStatus === 'AMBER' ? '#ED7D31' : '#1A7340'; const lines = (p.aiNarrative || '').split('\n').filter(l => l.trim()); const narHTML = lines.map(l => `

${l}

`).join(''); return `
${p.ragEmoji} ${p.name} ${p.ragStatus}
Schedule
${p.scheduleVarianceText}
Budget Burn
${p.burnPct}%
Open Issues
${p.openIssues}
% Complete
${p.pctComplete}%
Executive Summary
${narHTML}
`; }; // Count overall statuses const redCount = projects.filter(p => p.ragStatus === 'RED').length; const amberCount = projects.filter(p => p.ragStatus === 'AMBER').length; const greenCount = projects.filter(p => p.ragStatus === 'GREEN').length; const html = `
📊 Weekly Project Health Dashboard
${today}
Portfolio Summary — ${projects.length} Projects 🔴 ${redCount} Red 🟡 ${amberCount} Amber 🟢 ${greenCount} Green
${projects.map(summaryRow).join('')}
Auto-generated by n8n Project Health Dashboard · Every Friday at 5 PM
Data sourced from Google Sheets · Summaries by GPT-4o Mini
`; return [{ json: { html, subject: `📊 Project Health Dashboard — ${today} (🔴${redCount} 🟡${amberCount} 🟢${greenCount})` } }];

nodes.name: Slack: Alert on AI Step Failure

parameters.text: =⚠️ AI summary step failed for a project in the health dashboard workflow. Please check the execution log.

main.node: Attach AI Narrative to Project Data
Slack: Alert on AI Step Failure
